headline: Traders placed $580M in oil bets minutes before Trump’s Iran post
summary: Investing.com -- Traders on Monday placed bets worth about $580 million in the oil market approximately 15 minutes before President Donald Trump’s Truth Social post about Iran talks that sent crude prices tumbling, according to a report by the Financial Times.

raw.headline: Traders placed $580M in oil bets minutes before Trump’s Iran post
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Traders on Monday placed bets worth about $580 million in the oil market approximately 15 minutes before President Donald Trump’s Truth Social post about Iran talks that sent crude prices tumbling, according to a report by the Financial Times.

headline: Chevron CEO says oil market underpricing Hormuz closure impact
summary: Investing.com -- The oil futures market has not fully accounted for the supply disruption caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said Monday.

raw.headline: Chevron CEO says oil market underpricing Hormuz closure impact
raw.summary: Investing.com -- The oil futures market has not fully accounted for the supply disruption caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, Chevron CEO Mike Wirth said Monday.

headline: Fed’s Miran says pre-war forecast of four rate cuts in 2026 unchanged
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran said Monday the central bank should not adjust monetary policy based on short-term factors tied to the US and Israel's war in Iran.

raw.headline: Fed’s Miran says pre-war forecast of four rate cuts in 2026 unchanged
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran said Monday the central bank should not adjust monetary policy based on short-term factors tied to the US and Israel's war in Iran.

headline: Fed’s Goolsbee: I could see circumstances for rate hikes
summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago President Austan Goolsbee said Monday that the U.S. central bank could either raise interest rates or resume rate cuts, depending on how the war in the Middle East affects the economy.

raw.headline: Fed’s Goolsbee: I could see circumstances for rate hikes
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago President Austan Goolsbee said Monday that the U.S. central bank could either raise interest rates or resume rate cuts, depending on how the war in the Middle East affects the economy.

headline: Oil prices: What is behind WTI’s relative calm?
summary: Investing.com -- Despite intensifying disruptions across global energy markets, BCA Research says the muted reaction in West Texas Intermediate crude is giving a misleading signal.

raw.headline: Oil prices: What is behind WTI’s relative calm?
raw.summary: Investing.com -- Despite intensifying disruptions across global energy markets, BCA Research says the muted reaction in West Texas Intermediate crude is giving a misleading signal.

headline: 2 Consumer Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 We Ignore
summary: Regarded as defensive investments, consumer staples stocks are generally safe bets in choppy markets. But recently, the industry has failed to do its job as it shed 8.5% over the past six months. This drop was disappointing since the S&P 500 held its ground.

raw.headline: 2 Consumer Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 We Ignore
raw.summary: Regarded as defensive investments, consumer staples stocks are generally safe bets in choppy markets. But recently, the industry has failed to do its job as it shed 8.5% over the past six months. This drop was disappointing since the S&P 500 held its ground.

headline: United shares slip as airline cuts flights on soaring fuel costs
summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines shares moved lower in premarket Monday after the carrier said it will cut additional unprofitable flights over the next two quarters, as it braces for a prolonged period of elevated jet fuel prices tied to the Iran war.

raw.headline: United shares slip as airline cuts flights on soaring fuel costs
raw.summary: Investing.com -- United Airlines shares moved lower in premarket Monday after the carrier said it will cut additional unprofitable flights over the next two quarters, as it braces for a prolonged period of elevated jet fuel prices tied to the Iran war.

headline: Colgate-Palmolive Taps Healthcare And Regional Marketing Expertise For Growth
summary: Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) has appointed Dr. Christopher S. Boerner, CEO and Board Chair of Bristol Myers Squibb, to its Board of Directors. The company has also hired Hardik Jhaveri as senior director of marketing for its South Asean hub. For a consumer products company like Colgate-Palmolive, which is closely tied to global health, hygiene and personal care trends, these leadership changes sit at the intersection of healthcare expertise and regional execution. Investors watching large...
